name: Local Team Wins!
description: The Harbor Hammers pulled off a squeaky-clean miracle finish, and now every fan wants a lucky pennant, commemorative card, or anything signed by somebody's cousin.
notification_text: Local Team Wins! Sports collectors are charging the mall for the next %d days.
resolution_text: The victory chant has faded, and sports demand is settling down.
toast_message: The Harbor Hammers won! Sports memorabilia is suddenly blazing hot.

name: Influencer Mention
description: A feed-famous gadget goblin livestreamed a chaotic parking-lot haul, and now shoppers want whatever shiny thing flashed across their tiny phone screens.
notification_text: Influencer Mention! A viral clip is juicing demand for %s for the next %d days!
resolution_text: The algorithm has moved on. Demand is normalizing.
toast_message: An influencer just hyped the mall. Electronics shoppers are stampeding.

name: Supply Chain Snarl
description: A mountain of mystery pallets is parked on the wrong dock, and now half the delivery paperwork has entered a dimension made entirely of shrugging.
notification_text: Supply Chain Snarl! %s shipments are jammed up for the next %d days.
resolution_text: The pallets have been untangled. Suppliers are flowing again.
toast_message: A supplier snarl just hit. One category is about to get scarce.

name: Five-Finger Discount
description: A rumor about easy pickings has reached the wrong crowd, and nervous staff are suddenly treating every oversized coat like a side quest.
notification_text: Shoplifting scare! Someone just slipped %s off your shelves!
resolution_text: The suspicious crowd has scattered for now.
toast_message: A theft scare is rippling through the mall. Keep an eye on your shelves.

name: D-List Celebrity Sighting
description: A former game-show sidekick is signing glossy headshots by the cinnamon kiosk, and somehow that has turned the whole concourse into a spectator sport.
notification_text: Celebrity Sighting! A minor mall icon is drawing crowds. Expect 3x foot traffic today!
resolution_text: The crowd has dispersed, and the autograph table has vanished.
toast_message: A D-list celebrity is at the food court! Crowds are flooding the mall!

name: Corporate Bulk Buy
description: A cheerful procurement specialist has decided morale can be purchased in volume, preferably with a company card and zero follow-up questions.
notification_text: Corporate Bulk Buy! A buyer just dropped a large order worth $%.0f!
toast_message: A corporate buyer just placed a massive bulk order!

name: Price War Erupts
description: Two bargain zealots in the next wing keep undercutting each other with increasingly desperate neon poster copy, and shoppers now expect miracles for pocket change.
notification_text: Price War! Nearby stores are slashing prices. Demand dips for %d days.
resolution_text: The price war burned itself out. Normal spending expectations resume.
toast_message: A price war has broken out nearby. Shoppers are getting stingy.

name: Thunderstorm Warning
description: Rain is hitting the skylights sideways, the parking lot looks amphibious, and only the truly committed are making the trek inside.
notification_text: Thunderstorm Warning! Heavy weather is knocking down foot traffic today.
resolution_text: The storm passed, and shoppers are venturing out again.
toast_message: A thunderstorm is keeping shoppers away. Expect a slower day.
